channel.title: design patterns on
channel.description: Recent content in design patterns on

item.title: Kubernetes Patterns
item.description: Design Patterns Foundational Predictable Demands Health Probe Predictable Demands Automated Placement Structural Init Container Sidecar Behavioural Batch Job Stateful Service Service Discovery Higher Level Controller Operator References Ibryam, B and Huß, R (2019), Kubernetes Patterns, O’Reilly
